title: plumeria lanata
intro: Plumeria lanata, a flowering plant species in the Apocynaceae family, is native to tropical regions and is also known as the "hairy frangipani" or "hairy plumeria". It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and its extracts have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Plumeria lanata include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant's extracts can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
